title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A video demonstration of using Venngage AI's one-pager generator to create a client pitch document from a single prompt through to finished PDF export. The workflow covers content generation, design editing, image selection, call-to-action creation, and translation features.
writeup: The video walks through Venngage AI, a design tool that turns prompts into one-pagers and marketing documents, using a client pitch as the worked example. The demonstration covers the full workflow: content generation from a prompt, design, editing, image selection, and export to PDF. The takeaway is a prompt-to-document pipeline that produces a finished pitch in about 15 minutes.
